title: benkara fasciculata
intro: Benkara fasciculata, also known as the "Rough-leaved Benkara" or "Benkara plant", is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae, native to tropical regions. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The Benkara fasciculata plant is said to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. Benkara fasciculata is typically used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, where it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
